parameters.jsCode:
// Limpia y ordena la lista de incidencias dev para depuración
const all = $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(Boolean);
const now = Date.now();

const tickets = all
  .filter(t => t && t.id)
  .map(t => ({
    id: t.id,
    subject: (t.subject || '(sin asunto)').trim(),
    status: t.status,
    priority: t.priority,
    created_at: t.created_at,
    updated_at: t.updated_at,
    organization_id: t.organization_id,
    requester_id: t.requester_id,
    assignee_id: t.assignee_id,
    tags: t.tags || [],
    age_days: t.created_at ? Math.floor((now - new Date(t.created_at).getTime()) / 86400000) : null,
    url: `https://soporteyurest.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/${t.id}`
  }))
  .sort((a,b) => (b.age_days || 0) - (a.age_days || 0));  // más antiguos primero

return [{ json: {
  generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  total: tickets.length,
  ids: tickets.map(t => t.id),
  ids_csv: tickets.map(t => t.id).join(','),
  tickets: tickets
} }];
